channel.title: The Car Jury, News
channel.description: News and verdicts on the Indian car market from The Car Jury.

item.title: NHTSA Closes Honda Odyssey Airbag Probe After US Recall
item.description: US regulator closes its preliminary probe into 441,002 Honda Odyssey minivans after Honda's April recall over inadvertent side airbag deployments.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Tata Sierra EV Goes Full Harrier EV: Boost Mode, Terrain Modes, 500km+ Claim
item.description: Tata Sierra EV promo from Tal Moreeb dunes confirms Boost Mode, Sand Mode and dual-motor Quad Wheel Drive. The Car Jury verdict on whether it earns the badge.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Renault Kwid Facelift Lands July 3: Dacia Spring Looks, Same Old Bones
item.description: Renault confirms the 2026 Kwid facelift debuts July 3 with Dacia Spring-inspired styling, Y-shaped lights and a bigger touchscreen. Our verdict inside.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Next-gen BMW X5 LWB confirmed for India: chauffeur class wins again
item.description: BMW will bring the next-generation X5 to India in long-wheelbase form by H2 2027, joining the 3 Series, 5 Series and iX1 LWB lineup.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: New Hyundai Elantra Debuts In Korea: Sharper, Bigger, Still Not For India
item.description: Hyundai unveils the eighth-gen Elantra at Busan 2026 with new Art of Steel design, bigger footprint and updated hybrid. India is not on the list.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Luxury Car Sales Stall in 2026: Why The German Trio's Run Just Hit a Wall
item.description: India's luxury car market posts its first slowdown in over five years as Mercedes, BMW and Audi hike prices into a wary affluent buyer base.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Horse Powertrain Lands In India: Renault Duster Hybrid Gets Real
item.description: Renault-Geely's Horse Powertrain plans a Rs 3,500 crore India entry to build E85, E100 ready hybrid engines for the Duster and beyond.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Tata Bets on AI and TQM to Fix Its Quality Problem: About Time
item.description: Tata Motors says early-life vehicle issues are down 60 percent as it leans on AI diagnostics, digital twins and TQM to fix quality complaints.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Used Car Study 2026: Maruti, Hyundai, Kia Top Resale; EVs Bleed Value
item.description: Autocar India and Spinny's 2026 used car study pegs Maruti, Hyundai, Kia as resale champs. EVs lose value fast. What it means for buyers.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Renault, Nissan Sales May 2026: Duster Reboot And Gravite Carry The Alliance
item.description: Renault sold 4,113 units in May 2026, up 64% YoY on Duster's return. Nissan rode Gravite momentum. Triber, Kiger, Kwid, Magnite breakup inside.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Eighth-gen Hyundai Elantra Breaks Cover: Bigger, Edgier, And Still Not Coming Home
item.description: Hyundai has revealed the eighth-gen Elantra at the 2026 Busan Auto Show with sharper styling, a bigger cabin and an updated 1.6 hybrid.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Hyundai's Far-UVC Cabin Light: Genuinely Useful Safety Tech, Not a Gimmick
item.description: Hyundai is developing a Far-UVC cabin light that kills germs safely while occupants are inside. The Car Jury on why this is the right kind of innovation.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Honda 0 Alpha EV Spied In Manali: Big Screens Inside, But Where's The Launch?
item.description: Honda's 0 Alpha EV prototype spotted in Manali reveals a massive landscape touchscreen and digital cluster. The Car Jury's verdict on what it means.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: TVS And Hyundai Test Blue Move Electric Auto Service In Gurugram
item.description: TVS Motor and Hyundai begin testing Blue Move, an electric three-wheeler ride-hailing pilot in Gurugram. The Car Jury weighs in.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Hyderabad's IT Crowd Has Killed The 7-Year Car: Why Resale Now Drives The Buy
item.description: Hyderabad's IT workforce is flipping cars in 18 to 30 months, flooding the resale market and changing what buyers should pick. Here's our take.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: NHAI orders repair, puncture shops at highway Wayside Amenities: long overdue
item.description: NHAI directs Wayside Amenity operators to prioritise vehicle repair and puncture services on National Highways and expressways across India.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: BMW Confirms Next-Gen M3 Touring on Neue Klasse: Wrong Car for India
item.description: BMW confirms the next-gen M3 Touring will join the Neue Klasse line-up with combustion and EV versions, driven by US and China demand.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Maruti Brezza Facelift Finally Gets A Turbo-Petrol, Launches In July
item.description: Maruti Brezza facelift launches in late July 2026 with the Fronx-sourced 1.0L turbo-petrol, plus styling tweaks and added features. Here is our take.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Skoda Peaq Debuts: 647 km Range Flagship EV Aims at Kia EV9, Ioniq 9
item.description: Skoda's flagship Peaq electric SUV breaks cover with a 91 kWh battery, 299 bhp and 647 km range. The Car Jury on what it means for India.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: MG's Plug-In Hybrid Seven-Seater Lands July 16: Majestor Could Rewrite The Family SUV Math
item.description: JSW MG Motor will unveil a Wuling Starlight 560-based plug-in hybrid seven-seater SUV in India on July 16. The Car Jury verdict inside.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Renault Kiger Turbo Now Rs 1.46 Lakh Cheaper: Smart Move, Late Move
item.description: Renault Kiger Evolution+ Turbo MT launched at Rs 7.89 lakh, Rs 1.46 lakh cheaper than the old Emotion Turbo MT. Techno Turbo adds a manual. TCJ's verdict.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Tata's Plan to Hit 15 Models by FY2031: Ambition Meets Reality Check
item.description: Tata Motors will grow from 9 to 15 PV models by FY2031 with six new nameplates, chasing 18-20 percent share and 1.2 million annual sales.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Skoda Peaq EV: 647 km Flagship SUV That India Probably Doesn't Need
item.description: Skoda unveils the Peaq, a three-row electric SUV with up to 647 km range. India launch is under evaluation. Here is our take.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: MG Picks July 16 for PHEV SUV Debut: Likely a Rebadged Wuling Starlight 560
item.description: MG India will unveil a new energy vehicle on July 16, 2026, almost certainly a rebadged Wuling Starlight 560 PHEV to take on the Mahindra XUV 7XO and Tata Safari.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Tata Sierra EV Fully Revealed Ahead Of June 30 Launch: Harrier EV Underpinnings, AWD On The Cards
item.description: Tata Motors has revealed the Sierra EV in full ahead of its June 30 launch, with Harrier EV mechanicals and likely AWD. Our take.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Skoda Peaq revealed: 647km flagship EV that India actually needs
item.description: Skoda reveals the Peaq, a seven-seat flagship EV with up to 647km range, rivalling the Kia EV9 and Hyundai Ioniq 9. India launch under evaluation.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Tata's ₹40,000 Crore Bet: Six New Cars, 1.3 Million Capacity by FY31
item.description: Tata Motors will spend up to ₹40,000 crore by FY31 to add six nameplates, lift capacity 45 percent, and chase 20 percent market share.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Tata's FY31 Roadmap: 15 ICE Cars, 10 EVs and a Bet on Sierra and Avinya
item.description: Tata Motors unveils its FY31 product plan: 6 new ICE models, 4 new EVs and multiple facelifts, anchored by Sierra, Sierra EV and Avinya.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Tata's FY31 Math: 1.2 Million Cars, ₹6 Lakh Crore, and a Lot to Prove
item.description: Tata Motors PV is chasing 1.2 million annual sales and over ₹6 lakh crore revenue by FY31, powered by EVs and CNG. Our take on whether the math adds up.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Citroen Aircross Comfort Edition at Rs 9.09 Lakh: Leatherette, But Six Years Late
item.description: Citroen launches the Aircross Comfort Edition from Rs 9.09 lakh ex-showroom with leatherette seats standard and added comfort kit across variants.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: New Tata Altroz Spied Testing: Turbo-CNG Could Finally Wake This Hatch Up
item.description: A new Tata Altroz CNG test mule has been spotted in Pune wearing a 'CNG Only' steering sticker. Could it borrow the Nexon's turbo-petrol CNG setup?
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Xiaomi's YU7 GT laps the Nurburgring with no driver: a warning shot to Audi and Mercedes
item.description: Xiaomi's YU7 GT lapped the Nurburgring autonomously in 10:29.483, after setting an SUV production record. The Car Jury on what this means for German luxury.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Skoda Kodiaq RS first batch gone in six minutes: scarcity, not value
item.description: Skoda's 50-unit Kodiaq RS allocation sold out in six minutes. At an expected Rs 60 lakh, this is a status buy, not a sensible one.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Nissan Tekton Front Revealed: Baby Patrol Looks Loud, But Can It Beat Creta?
item.description: Nissan teases the Tekton's front fascia ahead of its 9 July Mumbai debut. Patrol-inspired grille, bold bonnet lettering, LED signature revealed.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Tata Tigor Facelift Rendered: Tiago's New Face Comes To The Sedan
item.description: Tata Tigor facelift rendered from official design patents previews redesigned LED headlamps, new grille and likely 360-degree camera. Launch nears.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Skoda Kodiaq RS India Brochure Out: 265 PS, 0-100 In 6.3s, And A Niche Buyer
item.description: Skoda Kodiaq RS India brochure reveals 265 PS, 400 Nm, 4x4, and a 6.3-second 0-100 km/h sprint. Our verdict on who should actually buy it.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Tata Tigor Facelift Leaks: Tiago's Twin Gets a Cleaner Face
item.description: Tata Tigor facelift patent images reveal slimmer headlights, a connected light bar, and a cleaner bumper. Launch expected in FY27 after the Sierra EV.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Hyundai Bayon Spied Next to Maruti Victoris: Creta's New Bodyguard Arrives
item.description: Hyundai's Bayon-based BC4i crossover has been spied next to a Maruti Victoris, signalling a new mid-size SUV fight below the Creta.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Skoda Slavia Facelift Interior Spied: Same Cabin, Minor Tweaks
item.description: Skoda Slavia facelift's interior has been spied ahead of its late-2026 India debut. Dashboard, screen and steering look near-identical to the current car.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: 2026 Skoda Slavia Facelift Cabin Spied: Kushaq-Inspired Update Lands Soon
item.description: Fresh spy shots reveal the 2026 Skoda Slavia facelift's cabin and exterior tweaks. Here is what changes, and whether buyers should wait it out.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Hyundai Smart Care Clinic: Useful Camp, But It Cannot Mask Aftersales Drift
item.description: Hyundai Smart Care Clinic runs June 24 to July 8, 2026 with up to 30% off service, warranty and RSA at 1,600+ outlets. Our verdict.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Nissan's India SUV Plan: Tekton First, Patrol At The Top
item.description: Nissan's revised India strategy brings the Duster-based Tekton mid-size SUV in July 2026, with the Patrol flagship to follow. Here's what we know.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Renault Duster And Nissan Tekton Lead The Hybrid SUV Rush For 2026-27
item.description: Renault Duster Hybrid lands this Diwali, Nissan Tekton Hybrid follows on the same CMF-B platform. Here is what Indian buyers should expect.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Mahindra's 15-SUV Launch Blitz: Scorpio-N Facelift Leads The Charge
item.description: Mahindra has 15+ new ICE, EV and hybrid SUVs lined up, starting with the Scorpio-N facelift around August 2026. Here is what is coming and what it means.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: India-UK FTA Opens EV Export Lane: Maruti, Mahindra, Tata Eye Britain
item.description: Maruti, Mahindra and Tata are evaluating UK EV exports under the India-UK FTA, with duty-free quotas rising to 88,000 units a year.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Chery Steals The Stockman Name For Its Diesel PHEV Pickup
item.description: Chery picks Stockman, a name once tied to Mahindra and Suzuki, for its new turbodiesel PHEV pickup launching in Australia later this year.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Tata Sierra EV Gets QWD Dual Motor: The Harrier EV Playbook, Again
item.description: Tata confirms Sierra EV will get a QWD dual-motor setup ahead of its June 30 launch, with a desert-run teaser hinting at serious off-road intent.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Tata Harrier Owner Wins Rs 21.4 Lakh Refund: A Warning Tata Cannot Ignore
item.description: A Himachal Pradesh consumer commission has ordered Tata Motors to replace a 2022 Harrier or refund Rs 21.4 lakh over manufacturing defects.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: BMW India Confirms: Your Existing Car Cannot Be Upgraded For E30 Fuel
item.description: BMW India boss confirms existing cars cannot be retrofitted for E30 ethanol blends as the government pushes beyond E20. Here is what it means for owners.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)

item.title: Porsche's Second Cost Cut in a Year: Leiters Wants a Deal Before July
item.description: Porsche CEO Michael Leiters wants a second cost-cutting package signed before July, with deeper Audi cooperation and lower output ahead.
item.author: noreply@thecarjury.com (Rajat Dewasi)
